label: External databases, APIs & live tools

node.label: External databases, APIs & live tools
node.definition: External-data tools connect a model or agent to databases, APIs, files, search engines, sensors, and continuously changing operational state.
node.why_it_matters: The role of External databases, APIs & live tools is to connect Caches, APIs & tool interfaces, Databases & information retrieval to downstream capabilities including Tool use & function calling, ReAct-style reasoning and acting, API gateways, tool registries & secure connectors.
examples: substrate for Tool use & function calling
substrate for ReAct-style reasoning and acting
substrate for API gateways, tool registries & secure connectors
limitations: Stored or retrieved information can be stale, private, contradictory, inaccessible, or incorrectly ranked at the moment it is needed. Its direct dependencies include Caches, APIs & tool interfaces, Databases & information retrieval.

dependencies.rationale: External databases, APIs & live tools uses Caches, APIs & tool interfaces as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
External databases, APIs & live tools uses Databases & information retrieval as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
External databases, APIs & live tools stores, selects, or obtains information through Sparse lexical retrieval.
External databases, APIs & live tools stores, selects, or obtains information through Dense vector retrieval.
